recommendations.title: With a Friend Like Harry...
recommendations.overview: While fixing up their summer cottage, Michel and his family run into a man who claims to have gone to high school with Michel.

recommendations.title: The Monk
recommendations.overview: A virtuous monk descends to the depths of sin and depravity after Satan sends an unholy temptress to lead him astray.

recommendations.title: The Night of the 12th

recommendations.title: Case 137
recommendations.overview: Stéphanie, a police officer working for Internal Affairs, is assigned to a case involving a young man severely wounded during a tense and chaotic demonstration in Paris. While she finds no evidence of illegitimate police violence, the case takes a pe

recommendations.title: Anatomy of a Fall
recommendations.overview: A woman is suspected of her husband's murder, and their blind son faces a moral dilemma as the sole witness.

recommendations.title: Flowers in the Attic
recommendations.overview: After the sudden death of their father, four children face cruel treatment from their ruthless grandmother.

recommendations.title: Wake Up Dead Man: A Knives Out Mystery

recommendations.title: Tell No One
recommendations.overview: A man receives a mysterious email appearing to be from his wife, who was murdered years earlier. As he frantically tries to find out whether she's alive, he finds himself being implicated in her death.

recommendations.title: Mothers' Instinct
recommendations.overview: When a sudden tragedy uproots the lives of two women and their families, they begin to question the relationships they once held so dear.
